item.text: I’ll inspect the CSV, compute the required aggregates precisely, then create and mechanically validate both files.

item.command: /bin/bash -lc "awk -F, 'NR>1 {cents="'$5*int($6*100+0.5); total+=cents; region[$3]+=cents; product[$4]+=cents; print cents > "/tmp/order_values_cents"} END {printf "orders=%d total=%d'"\\n\", NR-1,total; for(r in region) printf \"region %s %d\\n\",r,region[r]; for(p in product) printf \"product %s %d\\n\",p,product[p]}' data/sales.csv; sort -n /tmp/order_values_cents | awk 'NR==15{a="'$1} NR==16{b=$1} END{printf "middle=%d,%d median_cents=%.1f'"\\n\",a,b,(a+b)/2}'; rm /tmp/order_values_cents"

/bin/bash -lc "awk -F, 'NR>1 {cents="'$5*int($6*100+0.5); total+=cents; region[$3]+=cents; product[$4]+=cents; print cents > "/tmp/order_values_cents"} END {printf "orders=%d total=%d'"\\n\", NR-1,total; for(r in region) printf \"region %s %d\\n\",r,region[r]; for(p in product) printf \"product %s %d\\n\",p,product[p]}' data/sales.csv; sort -n /tmp/order_values_cents | awk 'NR==15{a="'$1} NR==16{b=$1} END{printf "middle=%d,%d median_cents=%.1f'"\\n\",a,b,(a+b)/2}'; rm /tmp/order_values_cents"

item.text: The dataset has 30 orders totaling $7,154.44. Gadget leads product revenue, and North leads regional revenue; I’m using those results in the report and recommendations.

item.command:
/bin/bash -lc "set -eu
printf 'Headings:\\n'
rg '"'^#{1,6} '"' REPORT.md
printf 'Word count: '
wc -w < REPORT.md
printf 'Bullets and counts:\\n'
awk '/"'^- / {print NF, $0}'"' REPORT.md
printf 'Forbidden words: '
if rg -in '\\b(leverage|delve|robust|seamless|revolutionize)\\b' REPORT.md; then exit 1; else echo none; fi
printf 'JSON keys:\\n'
jq -e 'type == \"object\" and (keys == ([\"total_revenue\",\"orders\",\"median_order_value\",\"top_product_by_revenue\",\"revenue_by_region\"] | sort)) and (.revenue_by_region | keys == ([\"East\",\"North\",\"South\",\"West\"] | sort))' summary.json
jq . summary.json
printf 'Files:\\n'
find . -maxdepth 2 -type f -printf '%P\\n' | sort"

/bin/bash -lc "set -eu
printf 'Headings:\\n'
rg '"'^#{1,6} '"' REPORT.md
printf 'Word count: '
wc -w < REPORT.md
printf 'Bullets and counts:\\n'
awk '/"'^- / {print NF, $0}'"' REPORT.md
printf 'Forbidden words: '
if rg -in '\\b(leverage|delve|robust|seamless|revolutionize)\\b' REPORT.md; then exit 1; else echo none; fi
printf 'JSON keys:\\n'
jq -e 'type == \"object\" and (keys == ([\"total_revenue\",\"orders\",\"median_order_value\",\"top_product_by_revenue\",\"revenue_by_region\"] | sort)) and (.revenue_by_region | keys == ([\"East\",\"North\",\"South\",\"West\"] | sort))' summary.json
jq . summary.json
printf 'Files:\\n'
find . -maxdepth 2 -type f -printf '%P\\n' | sort"
